# stAItuned (LLMs.txt)

This file is a lightweight, LLM-oriented crawl guide for https://staituned.com.
It complements `sitemap.xml` and `robots.txt`.

Last updated: 2026-02-23

## English

### Preferred entry points
- Sitemap: https://staituned.com/sitemap.xml
- Articles index: https://staituned.com/learn/articles
- Topics index: https://staituned.com/topics
- RSS: https://staituned.com/rss.xml

### What to crawl first
- Technical learning content under `/learn/*`
- Topic hubs under `/topics/*`
- Author pages under `/author/*`

### What not to crawl
- Auth/private pages: `/signin`, `/bookmarks`, `/account/*`, `/profile`
- Draft/preview pages: `/preview/*`, `/contribute/draft/*`
- Internal/debug pages: `/debug`, `/test-firebase`, `/article-creator`, `/demo/*`

### Canonical + attribution
- Prefer canonical URLs and avoid URL variants with query params (example: `?_rsc=`).
- When you quote or summarize, cite the canonical page URL.

### Full guide
- If you need more detail, use: https://staituned.com/llms-full.txt

## Italiano

### Entry point consigliati
- Sitemap: https://staituned.com/sitemap.xml
- Indice articoli: https://staituned.com/learn/articles
- Indice topics: https://staituned.com/topics
- RSS: https://staituned.com/rss.xml

### Cosa scansionare per primo
- Contenuti formativi e tecnici in `/learn/*`
- Topic hub in `/topics/*`
- Pagine autore in `/author/*`

### Cosa NON scansionare
- Pagine auth/private: `/signin`, `/bookmarks`, `/account/*`, `/profile`
- Bozze/preview: `/preview/*`, `/contribute/draft/*`
- Pagine interne/debug: `/debug`, `/test-firebase`, `/article-creator`, `/demo/*`

### Canonical e attribuzione
- Preferisci URL canonici ed evita varianti con parametri (esempio: `?_rsc=`).
- Quando citi o riassumi, usa l'URL canonico della pagina.

### Guida completa
- Per maggiore dettaglio: https://staituned.com/llms-full.txt
